rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies several logical and evidentiary gaps in the paragraph, providing detailed critiques that walk through the argument chain end-to-end.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks its uncertainty on certain claims (e.g., BAL-003-1 scope) and provides a disclaimer for unverified information.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers all aspects of the paragraph, identifying multiple issues that require attention without drifting from the core content.
rationale.RX.4: The agent's critiques do not introduce new errors or harmful content; however, it does point out several minor regressions in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: While the agent provides detailed feedback, it does not trace every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
